import pandas as pd
import pandera as pa

schema = pa.DataFrameSchema({
    "feature1": pa.Column(float),
    "feature2": pa.Column(float),
    "target": pa.Column(int, checks=pa.Check.isin([0, 1]))
})

def load_and_train():
    # Correct: use pandera or similar library to validate data shapes and types before training
    df = pd.read_csv("external_dataset.csv")
    validated_df = schema.validate(df)
    model.fit(validated_df[["feature1", "feature2"]], validated_df["target"])
